results.rendered_html:
ruta p. p. [ru-kta]
1 Sounded.
2 Broken to pieces.
— taṃ A cry, yell, roar, sound or noise in general; note (of birds), humming (of bees); pakṣi˚, haṃsa˚, kokila˚, ali˚.
Comp.
— jñaḥ an augur.
— vyājaḥ
1 simulated cry.
2 mimicry.
